2605.15185.title: Quantitative Video World Model Evaluation for Geometric-Consistency
2605.15185.paper_summary: Generative video models are increasingly studied as implicit world models, yet evaluating whether they produce physically plausible 3D structure and motion remains challenging. Most existing video evaluation pipelines rely heavily on human judgment or learned graders, which can be subjective and weakly diagnostic for geometric failures. We introduce PDI-Bench (Perspective Distortion Index), a quantitative framework for auditing geometric coherence in generated videos. Given a generated clip, we obtain object-centric observations via segmentation and point tracking (e.g., SAM 2, MegaSaM, and CoTracker3), lift them to 3D world-space coordinates via monocular reconstruction, and compute a set of projective-geometry residuals capturing three failure dimensions: scale-depth alignment, 3D motion consistency, and 3D structural rigidity. To support systematic evaluation, we build PDI-Dataset, covering diverse scenarios designed to stress these geometric constraints. Across state-of-the-art video generators, PDI reveals consistent geometry-specific failure modes that are not captured by common perceptual metrics, and provides a diagnostic signal for progress toward physically grounded video generation and physical world model. Our code and dataset can be found at https://pdi-bench.github.io/.
2605.15185.paper_summary_zh: 生成視頻模型越來越多地被研究作為隱式世界模型，但評估它們是否產生物理上合理的 3D 結構和運動仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>大多數現有的視頻評估管道在很大程度上依賴於人類判斷或學習的評分者，這可能是主觀的，並且對幾何失敗的診斷能力較弱。<lb/>我們介紹了 PDI-Bench（透視畸變指數），這是一個用於審核生成視頻中幾何一致性的定量框架。<lb/>給定一個生成的片段，我們通過分割和點追踪獲得以物體為中心的觀察（例如，SAM 2、MegaSaM 和 CoTracker3），通過單目重建將其提升到 3D 世界空間坐標，並計算一組捕捉三個失敗維度的投影幾何殘差：尺度-深度對齊、3D 運動一致性和 3D 結構剛性。<lb/>為了支持系統評估，我們構建了 PDI-Dataset，涵蓋了旨在強調這些幾何約束的多樣化場景。<lb/>在最先進的視頻生成器中，PDI 揭示了一致的幾何特定失敗模式，這些模式未被常見的感知指標捕捉，並為朝著物理基礎的視頻生成和物理世界模型的進展提供了診斷信號。<lb/>我們的代碼和數據集可以在 https://pdi-bench.github.io/ 找到。
2605.15185.author: Jiaxin Wu et.al.
2605.15185.authors: Jiaxin Wu, Yihao Pi, Yinling Zhang, Yuheng Li, Xueyan Zou
